name: Divine Domain
description: Choose a Divine Domain, which grants additional features and domain spells as you gain Cleric levels.

name: Channel Divinity
description: You can channel divine energy to fuel magical effects. The available options are determined by your Divine Domain and other Cleric features.

name: Destroy Undead
description: When an undead fails its saving throw against your Turn Undead, it is instantly destroyed if its challenge rating is low enough.

name: Divine Intervention
description: You can call upon your deity to intervene on your behalf. The success and effects are determined by the feature's rules.

name: Blessed Strikes
description: You are blessed with divine might in battle, allowing your weapon attacks or cantrips to deal extra radiant damage once on each of your turns.

name: Harness Divine Power
description: You can expend a use of Channel Divinity to regain an expended spell slot of an appropriate level.
